title: Atlas Expansion I: Domains 406-435 (Algebra & Combinatorics)

D406.name: Group representations over C
D406.reason: Characters χ(g)=Tr(ρ(g)): complex oscillatory; irreducible reps = EML-3

D407.name: Lie algebra representations
D407.reason: Highest weight theory: exp(weight) = EML-3 complex structure

D408.name: Algebraic K-theory K_0(R)
D408.reason: Grothendieck group: discrete; projective module classes = EML-0

D410.name: Algebraic K-theory K_2(R)
D410.reason: Milnor K-theory symbols: non-constructive; Matsumoto theorem = EML-∞

D412.name: Galois cohomology H^n(Gal,M)
D412.reason: Profinite group cohomology; complex coefficients = EML-3

D415.name: Crystalline cohomology
D415.reason: p-adic analogue of de Rham; complex structure = EML-3

D417.name: Perfectoid spaces
D417.reason: Tilting equivalence: complex analytic geometry = EML-3

D418.name: Condensed mathematics (Clausen-Scholze)
D418.reason: Condensed sets: analytic ring = EML-3 structure

D420.name: Prismatic cohomology (Bhatt-Scholze)
D420.reason: Unification of p-adic cohomology theories = EML-3

D421.name: Chromatic polynomial χ(G,k)
D421.reason: Polynomial in k; algebraic counting = EML-0

D424.name: Partition function of a graph
D424.reason: Z(G,β) = Σ_σ exp(-βH(σ)): single real exp = EML-1 (Ising)

D426.name: Ramsey numbers R(m,n)
D426.reason: Non-constructive existence; no polynomial formula = EML-∞

D427.name: Erdős-Rényi random graphs G(n,p)
D427.reason: Phase transition at p=1/n: EML-2 measurement (threshold)

D428.name: Spectral graph theory (Laplacian)
D428.reason: Eigenvalues of Laplacian: real measurement = EML-2

D430.name: RSK correspondence
D430.reason: Bijection: permutations ↔ pairs of tableaux; discrete = EML-0

D431.name: Kazhdan-Lusztig polynomials
D431.reason: Hecke algebra; complex oscillatory coefficients = EML-3

D432.name: Schubert calculus
D432.reason: Intersection theory on flag varieties; complex = EML-3

D434.name: Quiver representations
D434.reason: Gabriel's theorem: indecomposables = Dynkin roots; EML-3

summary.new_theorem: T140: Atlas Batch 1 (S420): 30 new domains classified; 0 violations

verdicts.algebra: K-theory ladder: K_0=EML-0, K_1=EML-2, K_2=EML-∞ (depth increases with K-theory degree)
verdicts.p_adic: All modern p-adic cohomologies (perfectoid, condensed, prismatic): EML-3
verdicts.combinatorics: Discrete combinatorics: EML-0; phase transitions: EML-2; algebraic: EML-3

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 1 (T140, S420): 30 new domains classified. K-theory depth ladder: K_0=EML-0 (discrete), K_1=EML-2 (determinant), K_2=EML-∞ (symbols). All modern p-adic cohomology theories (perfectoid, condensed, prismatic): EML-3. Combinatorics: discrete (chromatic, Tutte, matroid) = EML-0; phase transitions (Erdős-Rényi, spectral) = EML-2; algebraic (KL polynomials, Schubert, cluster, quiver) = EML-3. 0 violations. Total domains: 445.
rabbit_hole_log: K-theory ladder: K_0(EML-0), K_1(EML-2), K_2(EML-∞) — depth increases with degree
p-adic cohomologies: perfectoid, condensed, prismatic — all EML-3
